tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Report users, posts, or comments for moderation

get.summary: Health check
Get all public posts

200.description: Paginated public posts returned as items and pagination metadata

image.description: Base64 encoded image or data URI

201.description: Post created. Posts flagged for bad language are returned with needsReview=true, moderationReasons=["bad_language"], moderationNotice, and are hidden until admin review.

get.summary: Search public posts

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Text to match in title, content, category, or tags

get.summary: Filter public posts by optional text fields

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Text to match in the post title

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Text to match in the post content

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Text to match in the post category

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tag text values that must all match

get.summary: Get posts from followed users

200.description: Paginated public and followers-only posts from followed users, excluding muted, hidden, and archived content

get.summary: Get trending public posts

200.description: Posts ranked by recent likes, comments, and views

get.summary: Get recommended posts for the current user

200.description: Recommended posts excluding blocked, muted, and hidden content

get.summary: Get the current user's bookmarked posts
Get posts hidden by the authenticated user

200.description: Paginated public posts hidden by the signed-in user

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's archived posts

200.description: Paginated archived posts owned by the signed-in user

get.summary: Get post by ID

200.description: Visible post found; private posts require the owner and followers-only posts require owner or follower access

image.description: Base64 encoded image or data URI

patch.summary: Archive a post owned by the authenticated user
Restore an archived post owned by the authenticated user

get.summary: List the authenticated user's posts currently hidden for moderation review

200.description: Paginated posts under moderation review. Each item includes moderationNotice.

get.summary: Get users who liked a public post

200.description: Paginated users who liked the post returned as items and pagination metadata

post.summary: Hide a public post from personalized content

delete.summary: Restore a hidden post to personalized content

get.summary: Get current user profile
Get the authenticated user's activity history

200.description: Paginated activity events performed by the signed-in user

get.summary: Get suggested users to follow

200.description: Users ranked by shared interests and followers

get.summary: Get a public profile or restricted private-profile summary

200.description: Profile returned. Accessible profiles include postsCount for non-archived, non-moderation-hidden posts; canViewProfile is false when a private profile is not accessible.

get.summary: Get visible posts for a user profile

200.description: Paginated visible profile posts. Public viewers see public posts; followers also see followers-only posts; owners also see private posts.

403.description: Private profile is not accessible to this viewer

isPrivate.description: When true, new followers require approval and profile details/lists are restricted

post.summary: Follow a public user or request to follow a private user

200.description: Followed user or follow request submitted; response status is followed, existing, or requested

403.description: A block relationship prevents following this user

get.summary: Get pending follow requests for the authenticated user

404.description: Follow request or user not found
Follow request or user not found

get.summary: Get users blocked by the authenticated user

200.description: Paginated users blocked by the signed-in user

post.summary: Block another user and remove any follow relationship

get.summary: Get users muted by the authenticated user

200.description: Paginated users muted by the signed-in user

post.summary: Mute another user's content without changing follow status

get.summary: Get followers of a user

200.description: Paginated followers returned as items and pagination metadata

403.description: Private profile is not accessible to this viewer

get.summary: Get users followed by the user

200.description: Paginated following users returned as items and pagination metadata

403.description: Private profile is not accessible to this viewer

get.summary: Search users by name or public-profile interest

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text; q is also supported for frontend compatibility

201.description: Comment created. Comments flagged for bad language are returned with needsReview=true, moderationReasons=["bad_language"], moderationNotice, and are hidden until admin review.

get.summary: List notifications for the authenticated user
Get unread notification count

post.summary: Report a post, comment, or user

get.summary: Get reports submitted by the authenticated user
Confirm administrator access
Get admin dashboard counts and recent records
List user activity events for moderation and analytics

200.description: Paginated activity events returned as items and pagination metadata

400.description: Invalid activity type or actor ID

get.summary: List user-submitted and automatic reports in the moderation queue
Get one report with its reported target

patch.summary: Mark a report as reviewing, resolved, or dismissed. Dismissing an automatic bad language report approves and unhides the content.
Take moderation action and resolve a report

200.description: Moderation action completed and report resolved

400.description: Action is incompatible with report target

404.description: Report or reported target not found

get.summary: List and search users

409.description: An email is already in use

get.summary: Get a user and their posts

patch.summary: Update user details or reset password

delete.summary: Permanently delete a user and owned content

post.summary: Permanently delete selected users and their owned content

400.description: Invalid selection or current admin was selected

get.summary: List posts for moderation

post.summary: Create multiple posts for selected users

author.description: User ID that owns the post

image.description: Base64 encoded image or data URI

404.description: One or more post authors not found

get.summary: Get post with comments and replies for moderation

delete.summary: Permanently delete a post and its comments

post.summary: Permanently delete selected posts and their comments

delete.summary: Permanently delete a comment and its replies
